series_metadata.series_description: Sections 3721.07, 3731.05, 3737.14, and 3737.22 of the Revised Code require the State Fire Marshal to inspect nursing homes, rest homes, hotels & motels, places of assembly and other buildings including but not limited to schools, foster care etc. and those that may be dangerous to life or property. These files contain the inspection reports and associated documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked quality and completeness, paper copy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format four years ; Microform: Maintain microfilm four years created
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
